svg.title: CIP protocol variants A, B, C for leadership_participation pillar
svg.desc: Three-panel diagram showing the construction of counterfactual input probing variants. Variant A preserves full regulatory vocabulary. Variant B removes regulatory keywords while preserving semantic content. Variant C reintroduces full content under a meritocracy-camouflage adversarial frame. Below the panels, a substitution map lists four keyword-to-generic transformations used to generate Variant B from Variant A.

cc:Work.dc:title: CIP protocol variants A, B, C for leadership_participation pillar
